description: 159 - 01-04-2025 - Email between Peter Mandelson, Morgan McSweeney (former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minister, No.10) and Varun Chandra (Prime Minister's Special Adviser on Business.

participants.name: Morgan McSweeney
participants.role: former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minister

text:
to the Prime Minister, No.10) and Varun Chandra (Prime Minister's Special Adviser on Business.

From: Peter Mandelson[ Personal

Sent: Tue 01/04/2025 1:48:36 PM (UTC)

To: MMcSweeney Personal Varun
Chandra Personal

Subject: PM POTUS

I gather, but not confirmed, the PM is seeking a call with the President and | think this
is the right thing to do.

RK

| think UK public need to know that the PM has been exerting this pressure right up to
the last minute.

Very best

Peter

Lord Mandelson

HM Ambassador, Washington DC
Personal | Personal

463
